compiled_state.title: RED: Add project-understanding artifact tests to test-onboarding-skill.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add tests for .claude/project-understanding.md artifact generation.

### Tests to write:
- test_project_understanding_output: Assert SKILL.md references .claude/project-understanding.md as output
- test_understanding_sections: Assert SKILL.md mentions structured sections (stack, architecture, design, commands, infrastructure, enforcement)
- test_attribution_tagging: Assert SKILL.md mentions attribution (detected vs user-stated)
- test_human_readable_format: Assert SKILL.md mentions human-readable/editable format

### .test-index RED marker
Update onboarding entry with RED marker: [test_project_understanding_output]

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] At least 4 new project understanding test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_project_understanding\|test_understanding_sections\|test_attribution\|test_human_readable' tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'onboarding/SKILL.md.*\[test_project_understanding' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Ticket reviewed. Task is to add 4 test functions to tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh and update .test-index RED marker.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Read test file. Pattern confirmed: each test uses _snapshot_fail, grep against SKILL_MD, assert_eq with 'found'/'missing', then assert_pass_if_clean. 4 new tests will be added before print_summary.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Added 4 test functions (test_project_understanding_output, test_understanding_sections, test_attribution_tagging, test_human_readable_format) before print_summary. Run count updated to 12.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Updated .test-index entry for onboarding/SKILL.md to add RED marker [test_project_understanding_output].
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Tests validated. All 8 original tests still pass. New tests: test_project_understanding_output=FAIL(RED), test_understanding_sections=PASS, test_attribution_tagging=PASS, test_human_readable_format=FAIL. RED marker at test_project_understanding_output correctly blocks failures at/after that boundary.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check complete. AC1 PASS (4 new test functions present). AC2 PASS (.test-index has RED marker [test_project_understanding_output]). All 8 original tests still passing. Task complete.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Added 4 RED tests for project-understanding.md artifact
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
